mapper.sql: select author_id, user_id, real_name, pen_name, gender, birthday, nationality, affiliation, department, title, academic_degree, research_direction, email, phone, mobile, address, zip_code, id_card, work_no, status, is_deleted, delete_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from editor_author
mapper.insert: insert into editor_author ( user_id, real_name, pen_name, gender, birthday, nationality, affiliation, department, title, academic_degree, research_direction, email, phone, mobile, address, zip_code, id_card, work_no, status, is_deleted, delete_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{userId}, #{realName}, #{penName}, #{gender}, #{birthday}, #{nationality}, #{affiliation}, #{department}, #{title}, #{academicDegree}, #{researchDirection}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{mobile}, #{address}, #{zipCode}, #{idCard}, #{workNo}, #{status}, #{isDeleted}, #{deleteTime}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update editor_author set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where author_id = #{authorId}
mapper.delete: update editor_author set is_deleted = '2', delete_time = sysdate() where author_id = #{authorId}

update editor_author set is_deleted = '2', delete_time = sysdate() where author_id in
#{authorId}
